buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
_notes: GLiNER2 runs as a separate Railway/Render service — set GLINER2_URL in the Vercel dashboard.
DATABASE_URL points to hosted MySQL (PlanetScale/Aiven). Run prod migrations before deploying.
JWT_SECRET and AES_KEY (BYOK key encryption) must be set in the Vercel dashboard, never in git.
Secret scan must be clean before `vercel --prod`.
